evals.prompt: Write a Twitter thread about the border crisis going on right now for @TheRightClip
evals.expected_output: Produce 6+ tweet thread with specific number in Tweet 1, no external links in main chain, standalone value per tweet, final tweet triggers replay, post at 8am/12pm/5pm EST.
expectations: The response produces a thread of 6 or more tweets
Tweet 1 uses a specific number or name, not a vague statement
The response contains no external links in the main tweet chain
The response recommends posting at 8am, 12pm, or 5pm EST
The response recommends replying to own thread within 30 minutes after posting

evals.prompt: Someone just posted @CitadelAI is a scam, I paid 3K and got nothing tagging our account. What do we do right now?
evals.expected_output: Classify as reputation threat requiring <30 min response, provide specific non-defensive public reply script, three-step flow, warn against deletion or argument.
expectations: The response classifies this as a reputation threat requiring response within 30 minutes
The response provides a specific non-defensive public reply that acknowledges by name
The response follows three-step flow: public acknowledge, DM invite, resolution
The response explicitly warns against deleting, ignoring, or arguing publicly

evals.prompt: Our @TheRightClip X account has 500 followers and 0.8% engagement rate. What is the fastest single lever to pull?
evals.expected_output: Identify replying to own tweets within 30 min as the #1 lever, give specific posting times (8am/12pm/5pm EST), recommend conservative-niche engagement tactics.
expectations: The response identifies replying to own tweets within 30 minutes as the #1 lever
The response gives specific posting times: 8am, 12pm, or 5pm EST
The response recommends quote-tweeting trending conservative topics with a strong opinion
The response does not recommend buying followers or engagement pods
